whyRetrofitItems.headline: No Structural Work
whyRetrofitItems.sub: No demolition, no painting, no plastering. Your frames stay where they are.

whyRetrofitItems.headline: Suits Most Domestic Frames
whyRetrofitItems.sub: Custom adaptors fit timber, aluminium, and steel windows.

whyRetrofitItems.headline: Installed in One Day
whyRetrofitItems.sub: Most Melbourne homes done by sundown.

whyRetrofitItems.headline: Up to 70% Quieter
whyRetrofitItems.sub: Acoustic glass cuts traffic and tram noise.

whyRetrofitItems.headline: 50–55% Less Heat Loss
whyRetrofitItems.sub: Compared to standard single glazing — lower bills, warmer rooms.

whyRetrofitItems.headline: We Beat Any Quote by 30%
whyRetrofitItems.sub: Send us a real competitor quote. We come in 30% cheaper, in writing, with the 10-year warranty.

processSteps.title: Request a Quote
processSteps.body: Fill out our online quote form with your measurements and requirements.
processSteps.imageAlt: Homeowner using the online estimate tool on a phone

processSteps.title: Review & Proceed
processSteps.body: If you're happy with the estimate, simply email your quote through to us to proceed.
processSteps.imageAlt: Homeowner reviewing a double glazing quote online

processSteps.title: Site Visit
processSteps.body: We'll contact you to arrange a convenient time for a site inspection and final measure.
processSteps.imageAlt: Glazier conducting a site inspection and measuring windows

processSteps.title: Final Confirmation
processSteps.body: Once all sizes are confirmed, we'll lock everything in and schedule your installation.
processSteps.callout: Adds ~20mm to your frame width. We'll confirm exact measurements on site.
processSteps.imageAlt: Glazier completing a retrofit double glazing installation

faqs.q: Will this fit my existing windows?
faqs.a: Almost always yes. We retrofit timber, aluminium, and steel frames. If your frames can't take a retrofit, we'll tell you before any work begins — no charge.
Most jobs are done in a single day. Large homes might take two.
Most Melbourne homes land between $2,400 and $6,000 depending on how many windows you upgrade. Use our Instant Estimate to get your exact range in minutes.
10 years on glass and workmanship. Guaranteed in writing on every job, no conditions. See full warranty terms →

faqs.q: What if I already have a quote from someone else?
faqs.a: Send it to us. If it's a genuine quote, we'll beat it by 30% — guaranteed in writing.
